nasb.text: Surely God will shatter the head of His enemies, The hairy crown of him who goes on in his guilty deeds.

esv.text: But God will strike the heads of his enemies, the hairy crown of him who walks in his guilty ways.

cnv.text: 神必打碎仇敵的頭顱， 就是打碎那些常行在罪中的人的腦袋。

ccb.text: 上帝必打碎仇敌的头颅， 敲破怙恶不悛者的脑袋。

csbs.text: 神必然击碎他仇敌的头， 就是那行在罪中之人的头颅。
